testing_progress.highlight: Ball DevNet 3 launch delayed for spec alignment; client consensus issues resolved
All clients work individually; Geth causes disagreement when mixed with others
Spencer releasing updated spec today with small fixes; targeting Wednesday launch

repricing_updates.highlight: EIP-8037 spec has discrepancies between execution-specs and EIPs repo markdown
Static call check bug: state gas consumed before check, should fail earlier
Init code limit failure incorrectly returns state gas to topmost frame
State gas refill on failure postponed to DevNet 4 for thorough review

organizational.highlight: Parent frame state gas refund change excluded from DevNet 3 scope
Spec changes limited to aligning execution-specs with EIPs repo; no markdown updates
Clients using AI bots passing tests without validating correctness—review needed

action_items.action: Release updated EIP-8037 spec and tests with alignment fixes by end of day
Full review of EIP-8037 tests and wording before DevNet 4 launch
Start eth-magicians discussion on state gas refill philosophy and edge cases

decisions.decision: DevNet 3 scope limited to spec alignment; no EIPs repo markdown changes included
State gas refund on account/storage failures deferred to DevNet 4 discussion
If accounts get state gas refunds, storage slots must follow same pattern

targets.target: Wednesday next week - Ball DevNet 3 launch (post-spec updates)
